facebook.caption:
POV: you took a wrong turn on Võ Thị Sáu and found this.

Dinh Bà Thủy Long Thánh Mẫu is one of those places most tourists walk straight past. A working temple in the middle of Khu 1, 4.5 stars from 282 reviews, and almost nobody from the resort crowd knows it exists.

The incense, the colour, the quiet. Completely different side of Phu Quoc.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Smoke rising, offerings lined up, locals praying mid-morning. Dinh Bà Thủy Long Thánh Mẫu on Võ Thị Sáu is the real Phu Quoc most visitors never see. 4.5 stars. Zero tourist crowds. Tag your travel buddy.
